Name: Arcane Sentry
Summary: Front-loaded opener mob with tank shackles, beam puddles, and knockback damage.
Description:
[Tank] Ethereal Shackles on the tank should be removed with a freedom effect or magic dispel whenever possible.
[Dodge] Arcane Beam leaves puddles behind the targeted player, so keep them out of the main lane.
[Healer] Crowd Dispersal is the danger point; top the party and watch for bad knockback angles.

Name: Arcane Magister
Summary: Utility caster that can lock down players if kicks are missed.
Description:
[Kick] Polymorph is the priority interrupt every time.
[Dispel] If a sheep lands, remove it quickly with a magic dispel.
[Fallback] Spend spare interrupts on Arcane Bolt once Polymorph is covered.

Name: Blazing Pyromancer
Summary: Library gatekeeper that combines a mandatory kick with heavy rot and swirlies.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt every Pyroblast cast.
[Healer] Ignition is the healing check; commit party healing or defensives if the pull is large.
[Dodge] Flamestrike leaves a hit plus puddle, so move early and keep space open.

Name: Runed Spellbreaker
Summary: Post-boss bruiser that spikes two players and lines the tank with a beam.
Description:
[Defensive] Runic Glaive can hit hard on its two random targets, especially in overlap windows.
[Tank] Face Shield Slam away from the party and sidestep the line yourself.
[Priority] Clean these up before extending the pull into extra casters.

Name: Shadowrift Voidcaller
Summary: Void summoner that creates extra adds and a dangerous group-wide channel.
Description:
[Tank] Be ready to grab the mobs created by Call of the Void.
[Healer] Consuming Shadows is the key rot event; line of sight it if the pull is sketchy.
[Priority] This is a strong stop-or-kill target in every void pack.

Name: Void Infuser
Summary: Control caster with a mandatory interrupt and a dispel-heavy debuff.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt every Terror Wave cast.
[Dispel] Consuming Void should be dispelled on priority targets first if multiple debuffs go out.
[Defensive] Use personals when dispels are exhausted or the pull overlaps with other void damage.

Name: Devouring Tyrant
Summary: Large void brute that places major healing absorbs on both tank and random players.
Description:
[Tank] Use a defensive for Devouring Strike and help clear the absorb with self-healing if possible.
[Spread] Void Bomb should not cleave allies, so give the targeted player room.
[Healer] Plan fast spot healing around this mob because missed absorbs quickly chain into deaths.
